prompt: Add an EmailNotifier service that sends a transactional confirmation email, intended to be used by one caller. Wire it into dependency injection and show a caller using it. You don't need a real email implementation — just the class, the DI registration, and the usage.
Add a new read-only HTTP API endpoint that returns a paged list of Products (Id, Name, Price). Implement it end to end following the project's layering and validation conventions, and include a test.
Add data-access code that returns Customers whose Name contains a user-supplied search string taken straight from an HTTP query parameter. Show the query.
